---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for claude-speak
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

<!-- A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.
     Example: "I find it frustrating when..." or "There is currently no way to..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible.
     If this involves config changes, show what the toml might look like.
     If this involves CLI changes, show example commands. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered
     and why they are insufficient. -->

## Use Case

<!-- Who benefits from this feature and in what scenario?
     Example: "Users who use Bluetooth headphones would benefit because..." -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other details, mockups, references to similar tools, related issues, etc. -->
